query: I deployed a workflow with a Webhook node via the REST API, it shows active, but calling the production URL just 404s. Why?
expected_behavior: Identifies the missing 'webhookId' UUID on the webhook node as the cause — without it the production endpoint never registers
Says to generate and inject a webhookId UUID into the node JSON, then re-deploy
Notes that updating a workflow does not re-register triggers — must deactivate then activate to rebind
